ground_truth.title: Wireless Headphones Bluetooth 2024, 50H Playtime Deep Bass Earpods, Waterproof Earphone, Semi-in-Ear Headphone with Mic, Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds for Android/iPhone/Samsung (White)
ground_truth.main_content:
Brand: GUSILOR
Color: White
Ear Placement: In Ear
Form Factor: True Wireless
Impedance: 29 Ohms

About this item

Distinctive & Pioneering Design: The Gusilor E19 earbuds stand out with their unique and innovative design, inspired by the spacecraft's space capsule. Inside the charging case, the earbuds resemble astronauts seated in a spacecraft capsule, gazing through the transparent lid at the sparkling stars and vast expanse of the universe. In this moment, humanity appears both majestic and infinitesimal, seemingly merging with the cosmos to create an endless tapestry of legends.

Exceptional Sound, Superb Performance: The wireless bluetooth earbuds employ advanced ENC noise-canceling technology, delivering exceptional audio clarity that preserves the purity of original sound frequencies. Offering a realistic and lifelike sound experience, they truly immerse you in the moment. At 50% volume, they offer 6 hours of playback on a single charge, extending to 50 hours with the charging case for a seamless music experience.

Bluetooth 5.3, Effortless Pairing: The Gusilor wireless earbuds employ advanced Bluetooth 5.3 technology, delivering high-quality audio and a stable, low-latency wireless connection. Upon removing the earphones from the charging case, they instantly pair and automatically connect to the last paired device, eliminating complex operations and saving valuable time.

Easy Control & Extensive Compatibility: With the ease of touch control, the E19 Headphones empower you to switch music, answer calls, and adjust volume without lifting a finger. These wireless headphones boast exceptional compatibility, seamlessly pairing with iOS and Android devices, as well as Bluetooth-enabled Windows laptops, tablets, and desktops, ensuring a hassle-free experience.

Waterproof & Sweat-Resistant: With IPX4-level protection, the earphones defend against perspiration after a workout and humidity on rainy days, ensuring their durability and performance remain uncompromised.

Product Description

Distinctive Design: A sleek and modern exterior, paired with an intelligent listening experience, offers a dual treat for the eyes and ears.

Half-in-ear ENC Call Noise Reduction Technology: Effectively minimizes low-frequency noise for crystal-clear and immersive audio.

Stunning Audio Quality: Every sound comes through with clarity. Featuring a 13mm MPU lambskin diaphragm driver, expertly tuned for balanced frequencies, rich layers, authentic details, and emotional impact.

Transparent Highs with Precision: A 13mm wide-range dynamic driver reaches sound frequencies up to 20kHz, ensuring clear and full-bodied highs, with every note delivering pure and delicate music to your ears.

Powerful Bass That Touches Your Soul: A combination of a highly sealed independent sound chamber and air duct creates a low-frequency enhancement engine, delivering powerful bass that even a compact earbud can generate a powerful sound wave, immersing you in a thrilling musical world.

Precise Audio Capture for Clear Calls: With intelligent noise reduction and a highly sensitive ENC microphone, enjoy high-quality, undistorted conversations even in noisy environments.

Comfortable & Ultra-Lightweight Design: Ergonomic testing ensures a seamless and breathable fit, providing comfort even during extended wear.

Intuitive Controls for Seamless Responses: Slide and touch to adjust volume, answer calls, and more—all without reaching for your phone.

Stable Connection for Seamless Listening: Leveraging Bluetooth 5.3 technology for faster transmission speeds and stable earbud performance, ensuring an uninterrupted music experience.

Wide Compatibility: Works seamlessly with a range of Bluetooth-enabled devices, including phones, watches, laptops, TVs, and PCs, keeping you accompanied by music wherever you go.

Long-Lasting Battery Life: Enjoy up to 6 hours of playback at 50% volume on a single charge, or extend it to 50 hours with the charging case, meeting your needs for extended usage.

Powerful Battery with Quick Charging: TYPE-C charging port for rapid power-ups, combined with a charging case, allowing you to enjoy music on-the-go without worrying about battery drain.

Product information

Noise Control: Adaptive Noise Cancellation
Frequency Response: 10 KHz
Headphones Jack: Wireless
Model Name: E19
Connectivity Technology: Bluetooth
Material: Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene (ABS)
Charging Time: 1.5 Hours
Item Weight: 95 Grams
Water Resistance Level: Waterproof
Control Method: Touch
Battery Life: 6 Hours
Bluetooth Version: 5.3
Bluetooth Range: 10 Meters
Product Dimensions: 2.2 x 1.02 x 1.97 inches
Item model number: E19
Manufacturer: GUSILOR
Date First Available: May 12, 2024
ASIN: B0D1PC8551
